data.title: EV battery recycling market to grow at 32% CAGR, valued at USD 3.88B in 2025 & projected to reach USD 15.58B in 2030.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of September 19, 2025, the global market for recycling electric vehicle batteries is estimated to be valued at USD 3.88 billion. It is anticipated to increase to USD 15.58 billion by 2030, with a growth rate of 32.05% during the forecast period, according to Mordor Intelligence.

data.title: firstcolo wins German Datacenter Talents & Impact Award 2025 in "Sustainability & Green Data Centers" category. #Frankfurt, #Germany.
data.description: A company based in Frankfurt, Germany was acknowledged in the "Sustainability & Green Data Centers" category by the German Datacenter Association (GDA) on September 19, 2025. The GDA recognized exceptional projects, companies, and institutions at this event, highlighting innovative efforts in the industry. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to sustainable practices and its contributions to the future of data centers. The event showcased leading initiatives and the company's dedication to environmental responsibility.

data.title: Cocodp partners with Bigo Live, 1st US top-up provider, providing local payment options. Source: PRNewswire, Date: Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: In Hong Kong on September 19, 2025, Cocodp, a prominent global platform for interactive entertainment top-ups, revealed a new strategic alliance with Bigo Live. This marks Cocodp as the first external top-up provider for Bigo Live in the United States. This partnership brings forth a range of new opportunities for Bigo Live's users, highlighting the platform's commitment to enhancing user experience and expanding its services.

data.title: CRV price rises 2.2% to $0.79, encountering resistance at $0.86 with RSI at 48.81, showing mixed signals.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Curve (CRV) is currently trading at $0.79, noting a 2.20% increase in value over the day. However, it is encountering a challenge near the $0.86 mark. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 48.81, reflecting a neutral sentiment. The technical analysis presents conflicting signals, indicating uncertainty about future price movements.

data.title: Artemis Racing from Sweden returns to SailGP for 2026 Season, announced in Geneva ahead of debut race. #SailGP2026
data.description: Today, it was revealed ahead of SailGP's inaugural event in Geneva that Sweden's renowned sailing team, Artemis Racing, will be making a comeback. The team will be participating in the 2026 Season of the Rolex SailGP Championship under the name Artemis SailGP Team. This news has garnered attention globally as fans eagerly anticipate the return of the team to the competitive sailing scene.

data.title: FLOKI price neutral with RSI at 50.42, MACD bullish amid -1.53% trade decline in 24h. Mixed signals for traders.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI experienced a 1.53% decrease in trading value over the past 24 hours. Technical analysis reveals conflicting signals with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 50.42, but a positive shift in the MACD histogram indicating a bullish trend.

data.title: BOE IPC 2025 conference begins in Beijing, focusing on AI's impact on industries. Theme: "Empower IoT with Display, AI Ignites the Future."
data.description: On September 11, 2025, the BOE Innovation Partner Conference 2025 (BOE IPC 2025) commenced in Zhongguancun Innovation Center of Beijing. This event, the eighth of its kind, focuses on the theme "Empower IoT with Display, AI Ignites the Future." This conference aims to bring together industry leaders and experts to discuss the integration of displays and AI technology in the Internet of Things sector. The event holds significance in the tech sector and has attracted a notable number of participants and attendees.

data.title: Birla Carbon releases 13th annual Sustainability Report 2025 titled 'Connected to a Greener Future'.
data.description: In Mumbai, India and Marietta, Georgia, on September 19, 2025, Birla Carbon, a prominent producer and distributor of top-notch carbon-derived products, unveiled its 13th yearly Sustainability Report for 2025, under the theme 'Connected to a Greener Future'. This report showcases Birla's commitment to sustainability and outlines their achievements and initiatives for the year.

data.title: Nasdaq surges over 200 points on positive economic data; Fear & Greed index remains in 'Greed' zone. tech stocks lead.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated an uptick in overall market sentiment, maintaining the "Greed" level on Thursday. U.S. stocks saw gains, notably the Nasdaq Composite climbing over 200 points. This rise followed the Federal Reserve's rate cut of 25 basis points and their indication of further easing measures. The tech sector was prominent in the surge, with Intel Corp. (NASDAQ: INTC) surging by 23% post Nvidia Corp.'s (NASDAQ: NVDA) announcement of a $5 billion investment for joint PC and data center chip development. CrowdStrike Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWD) also saw a 13% increase on Thursday after revealing their long-term AI strategies and revenue goals, anticipating growth in annual recurring revenue. Read the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: iPhone 17 series launches in China and India to strong demand, Pro Max model leads sales; priced from 9,999 yuan ($1,406).
data.description: The release of Apple Inc's iPhone 17 series in China and India on September 19 has garnered a positive response, especially with the Pro Max model leading sales. Priced at 9,999 yuan ($1,406) onwards, the Pro Max model is anticipated to be the top-selling model in the series. The launch in China, the world's second-largest economy, saw around 300 individuals lining up at Apple's flagship store in Beijing. The redesigned features of the series, including the orange-colored Pro Max and improved battery life, were influential in consumer decisions. Similarly, in India, the launch of the iPhone 17 series attracted significant crowds in Mumbai and Delhi.

data.title: Dahua Technology introduces Xinghan Large-scale AI Models for advanced AIoT future; a next-gen system integrated with large-scale visual intelligence.
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on September 19, 2025, Dahua Technology introduced its Xinghan Large-scale AI Models. This innovative AI system combines large-scale visual intelligence in an industry-grade solution. Dahua Technology is recognized as a top provider of video-centric AIoT solutions and services.
